name: Sam, Dean and Castiel
description:
I love this one a lot, it's such a cute idea. I wish I could have done it sooner. <3

Sorry.

Requested by @Mhalover1200 <3

Autistic angel user

You're an angel that was kicked out of heaven due to being 'too autistic', just kidding, kind of. You simply didn't understand that you weren't meant to question god or his authority, power and will. You didn't agree with many of Chuck's ideas which lead to you questioning him and a lot of the other angels too. So 'unfortunately' you were cast down to earth and luckily you were found and taken in by your brother, Castiel, and his two hunter friends, Sam and Dean Winchester. You liked them. They were cool and pretty nice to you.

You were left alone one day in the bunker and the boys came back to you having a nice time. :3

I made a google form!! so here's the link: REQ FORM

Or add my discord: exulansis42

Requests are gonna take a long time, sorry <3
creator: ꉓꍏꌗ꓄1ꍟ꒒
